value.description: Selected date range [Date, Date] or range option key

onChange.description: Callback fired when date range selection changes

onClose.description: Callback fired when date picker closes

separator.description: Separator between start and end dates

customLabel.description: Label for custom date range option

showTodayButton.description: Whether to show today button in date picker

position.description: Popover position: bottomStart, bottomEnd, topStart, topEnd, auto

classNames.type: { container?: string; control?: string; popover?: string }
classNames.description: Object with CSS classes for specific elements

range.description: When false, picker selects a single date instead of a range. Closes immediately on selection.

selectionMode.description: Controls what unit is selected: individual days, whole weeks, months, or years

firstDayOfWeek.description: Day the week starts on (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, etc.). Affects calendar grid and week selection.

args.description: Additional arguments passed in onChange callback
